mapper.sql: u.id, u.email, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.bio, u.status, u.created_at, u.updated_at
GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT r.role_code ORDER BY r.id SEPARATOR ',') AS role_codes
mapper.select: SELECT , u.password_hash FROM users u WHERE u.email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT , u.password_hash FROM users u WHERE u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1

SELECT ,
FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_roles ur ON ur.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.status = 1 WHERE u.id = #{userId} GROUP BY u.id, u.email, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.bio, u.status, u.created_at, u.updated_at
